## Summary
**What does this PR do?** (e.g., Optimized the `__slots__` routine, fixed a `bf16` truncation bug).

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🚀 Optimization (Assembly is faster/smaller)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (Something wasn't working)
- [ ] 🛠️ Convenience (Made the Python wrapper better)

## Technical Proof (Don't waste my time)
- [ ] **Compiled:** Does the assembly compile with NASM/YASM and GoLink?
- [ ] **Tested:** Did you run it on Windows x64 and verify the output?
- [ ] **No Bloat:** Did you ensure no unnecessary dependencies were added?

## Performance Impact
How many clock cycles did this save? Or what is the new file size? 
(Provide data or logic to prove this is an improvement.)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the `CONTRIBUTING.md` rules.
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` or `bf16.dll` if necessary.
- [ ] I am ready for constructive disagreement if this isn't optimal.
